audio.name: silence_ratio_audio
audio.description: Fraction of audio that is silence (>300ms gaps)

audio.name: filler_frequency
audio.description: Rate of filler words (um, uh, like, ...) per minute

audio.name: avg_sentence_length
audio.description: Mean words per sentence — shorter = faster pace

audio.name: speech_rate_std
audio.description: Std dev of local speech rate — pacing variation signal

audio.name: crosstalk_score
audio.description: Fraction of time with overlapping speech

audio.name: excitement_peaks
audio.description: Count of audio energy spikes per minute (laughter, reactions)

audio.name: hook_energy_ratio
audio.description: Ratio of audio energy in first 30s vs full video mean; >1.3 predicts higher algorithmic traffic

audio.name: pitch_std
audio.description: Pitch variation — monotone vs expressive delivery

cast.name: speaker_count
cast.description: Number of distinct speakers detected (diarisation)

cast.name: speaker_balance
cast.description: Evenness of speaking time across speakers (1.0 = perfectly balanced, 0 = monologue). Normalised Shannon entropy: H / log(n_speakers).

cast.name: dominant_speaker_share
cast.description: Fraction of total speaking time held by the dominant speaker

cast.name: is_monologue
cast.description: 1 if single speaker holds >90% of time, 0 otherwise

cast.name: turn_count
cast.description: Total speaker turns across the video

cast.name: turns_per_minute
cast.description: Speaker turns per minute — higher = more dynamic conversation

cast.name: avg_turn_duration_s
cast.description: Mean duration of a speaker turn in seconds

cast.name: turn_duration_cv
cast.description: Coefficient of variation of turn durations (high = mix of quick banter + longer stretches)

cast.name: rapid_exchange_ratio
cast.description: Fraction of turns shorter than 10 seconds — banter signal

cast.name: dominant_speaker_sentiment_range
cast.description: Sentiment max - min for the dominant speaker (emotional range)

cast.name: dominant_speaker_sentiment_std
cast.description: Sentiment std dev for dominant speaker — consistency vs. volatility

cast.name: dominant_speaker_energy_range
cast.description: Audio energy max - min for the dominant speaker

cast.name: cast_sentiment_range_mean
cast.description: Mean sentiment range across all speakers — overall cast emotional breadth

cast.name: levity_intensity_ratio
cast.description: Ratio of positive-sentiment segments to negative-sentiment segments (values 0.5-2.0 are ideal; pure comedy or pure drama scores lower)

cast.name: energy_variance_across_speakers
cast.description: Variance of mean energy across speakers — diverse energy = diverse cast

cast.name: question_exchange_rate
cast.description: Fraction of segments containing questions — interview/conversation signal

cast.name: laughter_marker_count
cast.description: Count of laughter markers in transcript (haha, lol, [laughter], etc.)

cast.name: new_speaker_rate
cast.description: Rate at which new speakers appear (speakers introduced / duration_min). Higher = more dynamic cast reveals.

cast.name: first_new_voice_s
cast.description: Time in seconds until a second speaker appears (early = conversational hook)

cast.name: character_depth_score
cast.description: LLM-assessed depth and distinctiveness of characters/participants (1-5 scale)

cast.name: chemistry_score
cast.description: LLM-assessed chemistry and dynamic between participants (1-5 scale)

cast.name: personality_strength_score
cast.description: LLM-assessed how personality-driven the content is (1-5 scale)

engagement.name: comment_sentiment_mean
engagement.description: Mean VADER compound sentiment of top comments (-1 to +1)

engagement.name: comment_sentiment_std
engagement.description: Std dev of comment sentiment — polarisation signal

engagement.name: genz_score
engagement.description: Fraction of comments using Gen Z language patterns

engagement.name: share_intent_score
engagement.description: Fraction of comments expressing intent to share

engagement.name: parasocial_score
engagement.description: Fraction expressing personal connection to creator

engagement.name: comment_question_rate
engagement.description: Fraction of comments that are questions

engagement.name: emoji_density
engagement.description: Average emoji count per comment — emotional intensity

engagement.name: comment_avg_length
engagement.description: Mean word count per comment — engagement depth

engagement.name: satisfaction_score
engagement.description: Fraction of comments expressing satisfaction, praise, or positive completion

engagement.name: dissatisfaction_score
engagement.description: Fraction of comments expressing disappointment, frustration, or unmet expectations

engagement.name: rewatch_intent
engagement.description: Fraction of comments expressing intent to rewatch or indicating they rewatched

engagement.name: moment_reference_rate
engagement.description: Fraction of comments referencing specific moments (timestamps, 'the part where')

moments.name: peak_count
moments.description: Number of multimodal peak moments (convergent signals above threshold)

moments.name: peak_intensity_max
moments.description: Composite intensity of the single biggest moment

moments.name: peak_to_baseline_ratio
moments.description: Biggest peak composite score / mean baseline (how much peaks stand out)

moments.name: peaks_per_minute
moments.description: Rate of peak moments — too few = boring, too many = exhausting

moments.name: first_peak_position
moments.description: Position of first peak as fraction of video (early hook signal)

moments.name: last_peak_position
moments.description: Position of last peak as fraction of video (payoff timing)

moments.name: peak_spacing_cv
moments.description: Coefficient of variation of inter-peak intervals (regular vs. clustered)

moments.name: forced_variety_count
moments.description: Segments with simultaneous topic shift + visual change (scene cuts)

moments.name: visual_audio_convergence
moments.description: Segments where both visual (scene cuts) and audio (energy spike) peak together

moments.name: silence_before_peak_mean
moments.description: Mean silence ratio in segment before peak — tension buildup signal

moments.name: energy_contrast_at_peaks
moments.description: Mean energy difference between peak and preceding segment

moments.name: max_rewatch_magnitude
moments.description: Highest rewatch spike magnitude (how much above 100%)

moments.name: moment_impact_score
moments.description: LLM-assessed impact of peak moments (1-5 scale)

moments.name: shareability_score
moments.description: LLM-assessed shareability of peak moments (1-5 scale)

multiscale.name: ms_sentiment_range_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of sentiment_range — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_sentiment_range_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where sentiment_range peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_sentiment_range_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of sentiment_range across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_sentiment_mean_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of sentiment_mean — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_sentiment_mean_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where sentiment_mean peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_sentiment_mean_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of sentiment_mean across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_emotional_intensity_max_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of emotional_intensity_max — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_emotional_intensity_max_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where emotional_intensity_max peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_emotional_intensity_max_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of emotional_intensity_max across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_emotional_intensity_mean_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of emotional_intensity_mean — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_emotional_intensity_mean_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where emotional_intensity_mean peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_emotional_intensity_mean_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of emotional_intensity_mean across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_surprise_density_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of surprise_density — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_surprise_density_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where surprise_density peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_surprise_density_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of surprise_density across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_reveal_density_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of reveal_density — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_reveal_density_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where reveal_density peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_reveal_density_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of reveal_density across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_question_density_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of question_density — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_question_density_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where question_density peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_question_density_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of question_density across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_vocab_richness_mean_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of vocab_richness_mean — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_vocab_richness_mean_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where vocab_richness_mean peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_vocab_richness_mean_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of vocab_richness_mean across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_energy_range_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of energy_range — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_energy_range_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where energy_range peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_energy_range_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of energy_range across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_energy_mean_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of energy_mean — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_energy_mean_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where energy_mean peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_energy_mean_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of energy_mean across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_topic_coherence_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of topic_coherence — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_topic_coherence_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where topic_coherence peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_topic_coherence_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of topic_coherence across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_word_density_max
multiscale.description: Cross-scale max of word_density — most salient value across all temporal scales

multiscale.name: ms_word_density_argmax_scale
multiscale.description: Temporal scale (seconds) where word_density peaked — the natural loop length for this signal

multiscale.name: ms_word_density_scale_var
multiscale.description: Variance of word_density across scales — high means scale-sensitive, low means scale-invariant

multiscale.name: ms_natural_loop_length_s
multiscale.description: Median argmax_scale across all features — the video's dominant loop duration in seconds

multiscale.name: ms_scale_agreement
multiscale.description: How much features agree on the natural scale (1 - normalised entropy of argmax distribution)

multiscale.name: ms_n_valid_scales
multiscale.description: Number of temporal scales with enough windows for analysis

multiscale.name: ms_finest_active_scale
multiscale.description: Finest (shortest) scale that had valid windows — lower bound of loop length

multiscale.name: ms_coarsest_active_scale
multiscale.description: Coarsest (longest) scale that had valid windows — upper bound of loop length

multiscale.name: ms_llm_loop_completeness
multiscale.description: LLM-assessed fraction of windows at best scale that form complete mini-stories (beginning-tension-resolution). 0-1 scale.

multiscale.name: ms_llm_loop_variety
multiscale.description: LLM-assessed variety across windows — are loops diverse in content or repetitive? 1=identical loops, 5=rich variety with escalation.

multiscale.name: ms_llm_boundary_quality
multiscale.description: LLM-assessed quality of window boundaries — do they align with natural topic transitions? 1=arbitrary splits, 5=perfect boundaries.

multiscale.name: ms_llm_escalation_across_loops
multiscale.description: LLM-assessed escalation — do later loops raise the stakes? 1=flat/declining, 5=masterful escalation.

multiscale.name: ms_llm_dominant_loop_type
multiscale.description: LLM-classified loop archetype: challenge, reaction, story, tutorial, conversation, reveal, competition, montage, or mixed.

narrative.name: segment_count
narrative.description: Number of detected narrative segments (topic/energy boundaries)

narrative.name: avg_segment_duration_s
narrative.description: Mean segment length in seconds

narrative.name: segment_duration_regularity
narrative.description: Coefficient of variation of segment durations (low=regular loops, high=irregular)

narrative.name: topic_shift_count
narrative.description: Number of significant topic shifts (Jaccard > 0.6 between segments)

narrative.name: topic_shift_rate_per_min
narrative.description: Topic shifts per minute — pacing signal

narrative.name: escalation_sentiment
narrative.description: Slope of sentiment trajectory across segments (positive=escalating emotion)

narrative.name: escalation_energy
narrative.description: Slope of audio energy across segments (positive=building intensity)

narrative.name: escalation_intensity
narrative.description: Slope of emotional vocabulary intensity across segments

narrative.name: intensity_at_3min_ratio
narrative.description: Emotional intensity at 3-minute mark relative to opening (>1 = story evolving)

narrative.name: first_major_shift_s
narrative.description: Time in seconds of first significant topic/energy shift

narrative.name: sentiment_arc_type
narrative.description: Narrative arc shape: rising, falling, peak_valley, U_shape, flat, escalating

narrative.name: dynamic_range
narrative.description: Max segment sentiment minus min — breadth of emotional journey

narrative.name: final_segment_sentiment
narrative.description: Sentiment of the last segment — positive = good payoff

narrative.name: ending_vs_mean_sentiment
narrative.description: Last segment sentiment minus overall mean (>0 = ends on a high)

narrative.name: resolution_language_score
narrative.description: Density of resolution/conclusion language in final 15%

narrative.name: cliffhanger_score
narrative.description: Density of open-loop/suspension language at end

narrative.name: scene_cut_rate_per_min
narrative.description: Scene cuts per minute — visual variety pacing

narrative.name: visual_variety_std
narrative.description: Std dev of scene cuts across segments — uneven = forced variety moments

narrative.name: retention_loop_count
narrative.description: Re-engagement spikes in retention curve (loop restart signal)

narrative.name: end_retention_ratio
narrative.description: Last 20% retention / overall mean (>1 = strong payoff, people stay)

narrative.name: loop_quality_score
narrative.description: LLM-assessed quality of loop structure (1-5 scale)

narrative.name: payoff_satisfaction_score
narrative.description: LLM-assessed ending satisfaction (1-5 scale)

narrative.name: pacing_quality_score
narrative.description: LLM-assessed pacing quality (1-5 scale)

text_nlp.name: title_shock_word_count
text_nlp.description: Number of shock/clickbait words in title

text_nlp.name: title_fomo_score
text_nlp.description: FOMO signal — presence of scarcity/urgency language

text_nlp.name: title_challenge_framing
text_nlp.description: Title frames content as a challenge, test, or dare

text_nlp.name: title_length_words
text_nlp.description: Number of words in title (sweet spot 6–10 for CTR)

text_nlp.name: title_all_caps_ratio
text_nlp.description: Fraction of characters that are uppercase

text_nlp.name: title_emotional_words
text_nlp.description: Count of strong emotional words in title

text_nlp.name: title_colon_split
text_nlp.description: Title uses 'X: Y' or 'X | Y' split pattern

video_meta.name: duration_seconds
video_meta.description: Video length in seconds

video_meta.name: duration_bucket
video_meta.description: Duration category: short/medium/long/verylong

video_meta.name: is_short
video_meta.description: YouTube Short (<= 60s)

video_meta.name: format_type
video_meta.description: Inferred format: challenge, reaction, vlog, interview, list, tutorial, documentary, other

video_meta.name: publish_hour
video_meta.description: Hour of day published (0–23)

video_meta.name: publish_day_of_week
video_meta.description: Day of week published (0=Mon, 6=Sun)

video_meta.name: publish_weekend
video_meta.description: Published on Saturday or Sunday

video_meta.name: days_since_publish
video_meta.description: Days between publish date and data snapshot

video_meta.name: tags_count
video_meta.description: Number of tags on the video

video_meta.name: geo_us_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from United States

video_meta.name: geo_eu_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from EU aggregate

video_meta.name: geo_latam_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from Latin America

video_meta.name: geo_asia_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from Asia

video_meta.name: geo_nl_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from Netherlands

video_meta.name: geo_be_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from Belgium

video_meta.name: geo_other_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from other regions

video_meta.name: traffic_algorithmic_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from algorithm (Browse + Suggested)

video_meta.name: traffic_subscriber_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from subscriber feed

video_meta.name: traffic_search_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from YouTube Search

video_meta.name: traffic_external_pct
video_meta.description: Fraction of views from external sources

visual.name: thumb_center_weight
visual.description: Fraction of visual energy in center 40% of frame

visual.name: thumb_face_size
visual.description: Fraction of frame area covered by largest detected face

visual.name: thumb_face_count
visual.description: Number of faces detected in thumbnail

visual.name: thumb_sharpness
visual.description: Laplacian variance — proxy for image quality/sharpness

visual.name: thumb_edge_density
visual.description: Canny edge pixel ratio — visual complexity

visual.name: thumb_dominant_hue
visual.description: Dominant hue angle (0–360) from HSV histogram peak

visual.name: thumb_saturation_mean
visual.description: Mean saturation in HSV — vibrancy signal
